data.title: Subresultant chains using Bézout matrices
data.authors: Mohammadali Asadi, Alexander Brandt, David J Jeffrey, Marc Moreno Maza
data.book: International Workshop on Computer Algebra in Scientific Computing
data.description: Subresultant chains over rings of multivariate polynomials are calculated using a speculative approach based on the Bézout matrix. Our experimental results yield significant speedup factors for the proposed approach against comparable methods. The determinant computations are based on fraction-free Gaussian elimination using various pivoting strategies.
